title: MAGA PRINCIPAL JUST SHUT DOWN HIS WOKE STUDENTS & IT WAS EPIC
description:
The Quartering analyzes the chaos surrounding recent student "anti-ICE" walkouts in Florida, North Carolina, and Oklahoma, praising a viral "Chad" principal who forced students to choose between returning to class or facing immediate suspension.

#TheQuartering #SchoolWalkout #ICEProtest #Oklahoma #Florida #Education #CommonSense #CultureWar #Politics #PrincipalBased
